mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT ON (type) id, type, version, title, is_required, effective_at, content FROM terms_versions WHERE effective_at <= NOW() ORDER BY type, effective_at DESC, version DESC

WITH active_terms AS ( SELECT DISTINCT ON (type) id AS term_id, type, version, title, is_required AS required FROM terms_versions WHERE effective_at <= NOW() ORDER BY type, effective_at DESC, version DESC ) SELECT active_terms.term_id, active_terms.type, active_terms.version, active_terms.title, active_terms.required, COALESCE(user_term_agreements.agreed, FALSE) AS agreed, user_term_agreements.agreed_at FROM active_terms LEFT JOIN user_term_agreements ON user_term_agreements.term_version_id = active_terms.term_id AND user_term_agreements.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY active_terms.type
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_term_agreements (user_id, term_version_id, agreed) VALUES (#{userId}, #{termId}, #{agreed}) ON CONFLICT (user_id, term_version_id) DO UPDATE SET agreed = EXCLUDED.agreed, agreed_at = NOW()
